evals.prompt: Add a new skill to 0langas-skill-center, make it work in Codex, Claude Code, and Kimi Code, add trigger evals, update the README, sync links, and run checks.
evals.expected_output: Orchestrates docs cache, tri-client porting, trigger evals, install sync, README update, and deterministic validation.

evals.prompt: I renamed a skill and the repo is messy now. Curate the skill center so the old name is gone, the new one is documented, and all provider links are correct.
evals.expected_output: Inspects git state, applies rename policy, repairs provider links, updates eval metadata and README, and reports any user-level install conflicts.

evals.prompt: Before I publish these skills, do a full skill-center readiness pass.
evals.expected_output: Runs checks for frontmatter, links, evals, README, docs cache, and install state, then reports commit/release readiness.
